overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along the Pacifica waterfront. The player moves from a covered walkway beside a pyramid-shaped building down to an open promenade lined with palm trees, passing a photographer and approaching a neon-lit commercial area with a ferris wheel and roller coaster visible in the distance. The scene features bright morning sunlight, futuristic architecture, and construction cranes against a clear blue sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway adjacent to a massive pyramid-shaped building. The camera moves forward along the elevated path with views of a highway and ocean beyond, then turns and descends a flight of stairs. The lighting transitions from shaded to bright sunlight as the player approaches the open waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with amusement park views

approaching and passing photographer standing on promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along open waterfront promenade toward amusement park area with ferris wheel

notable_agents.action: photographer in white coat taking pictures of the waterfront and ferris wheel

entered.detail: metal safety barrier separating walkway from water
large amusement park ferris wheel visible against the skyline
amusement park roller coaster tracks and structure
small white rectangular structure on the promenade
bright cyan neon sign reading GULF on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open waterfront promenade with the ocean on the left and palm trees lining the path. The pyramid building recedes as a large ferris wheel and roller coaster become visible in the distance. The player approaches a photographer in a white coat taking pictures, while a bright cyan neon sign reading 'GULF' appears on a building to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial waterfront with neon signage and construction

events.description: entering area with prominent neon signage and construction cranes
approaching dense construction zone with multiple skyscrapers under development

agents.ego_description: walking past the GULF neon sign toward the construction area with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking in same direction along promenade

entered.detail: multiple tower cranes atop unfinished skyscrapers
tall building under construction with exposed framework
large empty billboard framework on metal poles

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a walk past the prominent cyan 'GULF' neon sign on the right, with the ferris wheel now behind. The path continues toward a dense construction zone featuring multiple tower cranes and unfinished skyscrapers. Several pedestrians walk ahead, and the atmosphere shifts to a more urban commercial feel with the bright neon contrasting against the morning sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded architectural walkway into a bright, neon-accented urban waterfront. It begins under the cover of a massive pyramid-shaped building, moving along an elevated path with views of the ocean and highway before descending a flight of stairs. As the camera emerges into the bright morning sunlight, the scene opens onto a palm-lined promenade where the pyramid recedes and a distant ferris wheel and roller coaster come into view. The path then leads past a photographer in a white coat and toward a prominent cyan GULF neon sign, shifting the atmosphere from a coastal breeze to a commercial hub. Finally, the camera moves beyond the neon lights toward a dense construction zone filled with tower cranes and unfinished skyscrapers under a clear blue sky.
